mapper.sql:
AND p.del_yn = 'N' AND p.approval_yn = 'Y'
AND p.board_gbn_cd = #{boardGbnCd}
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
mapper.select:
SELECT p.post_no, p.board_gbn_cd, p.member_no, p.title, p.view_cnt, p.like_cnt, p.dislike_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_COMMENT c2 WHERE c2.post_no = p.post_no AND c2.del_yn = 'N' AND c2.approval_yn = 'Y' ) AS comment_cnt, p.approval_yn, p.del_yn, p.create_ts, p.update_ts, COALESCE(m.nickname, '익명') AS nickname FROM BRD_POST_MST p LEFT JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON m.member_no = p.member_no WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY p.post_no DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_MST p WHERE 1=1

SELECT p.post_no, p.board_gbn_cd, p.member_no, p.title, p.content, p.view_cnt, p.like_cnt, p.dislike_cnt, p.comment_cnt, p.approval_yn, p.del_yn, p.create_ts, p.update_ts, COALESCE(m.nickname, '익명') AS nickname FROM BRD_POST_MST p LEFT JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON m.member_no = p.member_no WHERE p.post_no = #{postNo} AND p.del_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BRD_POST_MST (board_gbn_cd, member_no, title, content, view_cnt, like_cnt, dislike_cnt, comment_cnt, reg_ip, approval_yn, del_yn) VALUES (#{boardGbnCd}, #{memberNo}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, 0, 0, 0, #{regIp}, 'Y', 'N')
mapper.update: UPDATE BRD_POST_MST SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, update_ts = NOW() WHERE post_no = #{postNo} AND member_no = #{memberNo} AND del_yn = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT reaction_typ_cd FROM BRD_POST_REACTION WHERE post_typ_cd = '1' AND post_no = #{postNo} AND comment_no = 0 AND member_no = #{memberNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BRD_POST_REACTION (post_typ_cd, post_no, comment_no, member_no, reaction_typ_cd) VALUES ('1', #{postNo}, 0, #{memberNo}, #{reactionTypCd}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE reaction_typ_cd = #{reactionTypCd}
mapper.update: UPDATE BRD_POST_MST SET like_cnt = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_REACTION WHERE post_no = #{postNo} AND post_typ_cd = '1' AND reaction_typ_cd = '1'), dislike_cnt = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_REACTION WHERE post_no = #{postNo} AND post_typ_cd = '1' AND reaction_typ_cd = '2') WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_no, c.post_no, c.parent_comment_no, c.depth, c.member_no, c.content, c.like_cnt, c.dislike_cnt, c.approval_yn, c.del_yn, c.create_ts, c.update_ts, COALESCE(m.nickname, '익명') AS nickname FROM BRD_POST_COMMENT c LEFT JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON m.member_no = c.member_no WHERE c.post_no = #{postNo} AND c.del_yn = 'N' AND c.approval_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY COALESCE(c.parent_comment_no, c.comment_no), c.comment_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BRD_POST_COMMENT (post_no, parent_comment_no, depth, member_no, content, like_cnt, dislike_cnt, reg_ip, approval_yn, del_yn) VALUES (#{postNo}, #{parentCommentNo}, #{depth}, #{memberNo}, #{content}, 0, 0, #{regIp}, 'Y', 'N')
mapper.update: UPDATE BRD_POST_MST SET comment_cnt = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_COMMENT WHERE post_no = #{postNo} AND del_yn = 'N') WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
